# Generated `src/` index

This page is generated by `npm run docs:gen`. It lists top-level `src/` entries and **immediate** children of each directory so you can jump to paths in your editor (for example `src/services/mcp/client.ts`).

## Top-level files

| Path | Note |
|------|------|
| `src/commands.ts` | Slash command registry |
| `src/context.ts` | System / user context |
| `src/cost-tracker.ts` | Token cost tracking |
| `src/costHook.ts` | — |
| `src/dialogLaunchers.tsx` | — |
| `src/history.ts` | — |
| `src/ink.ts` | — |
| `src/interactiveHelpers.tsx` | — |
| `src/main.tsx` | CLI entry; Commander + Ink bootstrap |
| `src/projectOnboardingState.ts` | — |
| `src/query.ts` | — |
| `src/QueryEngine.ts` | LLM query loop (very large) |
| `src/replLauncher.tsx` | — |
| `src/setup.ts` | — |
| `src/Task.ts` | — |
| `src/tasks.ts` | — |
| `src/Tool.ts` | Tool types and schemas (very large) |
| `src/tools.ts` | Tool registry |
